Line 116:  "a.Data.length;\r\n                        var i = 0;\r\n                        var " +
Line 117:  "touchpointSelectList = \"<option value=\'\'></option>\";\r\n                        fo" +
Line 118:  "r (i = 0; i < len; i++) {\r\n                            touchpointSelectList += \"" +
Line 119:  "<option value=\'\" + data.Data[i].id + \"\'>\" + data.Data[i].title + \"</option>\";\r\n " +
Line 120:  "                       }\r\n\r\n                        $(\'#touchpoint\').html(touchp" +
Line 121:  "ointSelectList);\r\n                        $(\'#touchpointDiv\').show();\r\n\r\n       " +
Line 122:  "             },\r\n                    error: function (data) {\r\n                 " +
Line 123:  "       var touchpointSelectList = \"<option value=\'\'> -Select-</option>\";\r\n      " +
Line 124:  "                  $(\'#touchpoint\').html(touchpointSelectList);\r\n                " +
Line 125:  "    }\r\n                });\r\n\r\n\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            $(\'#touchpoint\')." +
Line 126:  "change(function () {\r\n                $(\'#partnertypeDiv\').show();\r\n            " +
Line 127:  "    $(\'#touchpointName\').val($(\'#touchpoint option[value=\"\' + $(\'#touchpoint\').v" +
Line 128:  "al() + \'\"]\').text());\r\n\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            $(\'#partnertype\').change" +
Line 129:  "(function () {\r\n                $(\'#levelDiv\').show();\r\n                $(\'#part" +
Line 130:  "nertypeName\').val($(\'#partnertype option[value=\"\' + $(\'#partnertype\').val() + \'\"" +
Line 131:  "]\').text());\r\n            });\r\n\r\n            $(\'#level\').change(function () {\r\n " +
Line 132:  "               $(\'#uploadDiv\').show();\r\n                $(\'#uploadButtonDiv\').sh" +
Line 133:  "ow();\r\n            });\r\n\r\n\r\n            $(\'#uploadquestionnaireform\').submit(fun" +
Line 134:  "ction (e) {\r\n                e.preventdefault();\r\n                var objprotoco" +
Line 135:  "lid = $(\'#protocol\').val();\r\n                var objprotocolname = $(\'#protocol " +
Line 136:  "option[value=\"\' + $(\'#protocol\').val() + \'\"]\').text();\r\n\r\n                var ob" +
Line 137:  "jtouchpointid = $(\'#touchpoint\').val();\r\n                var objtouchpointname =" +
Line 138:  " $(\'#touchpoint option[value=\"\' + $(\'#touchpoint\').val() + \'\"]\').text();\r\n\r\n    " +
Line 139:  "            var objpartnertypeid = $(\'#partnertype\').val();\r\n                var" +
Line 140:  " objpartnertypename = $(\'#partnertype option[value=\"\' + $(\'#partnertype\').val() " +
Line 141:  "+ \'\"]\').text();\r\n\r\n                var objlevelid = $(\'#level\').val();\r\n        " +
Line 142:  "       // var objlevelname = $(\'#level option[value=\"\' + $(\'#level\').val() + \'\"]" +
Line 143:  "\').text();\r\n\r\n                var formdata = { protocolid: objprotocolid, protoc" +
Line 144:  "olname: objprotocolname, touchpointid: objtouchpointid, touchpointname: objtouch" +
Line 145:  "pointname, partnertypeid: objpartnertypeid, partnertypename: objpartnertypename," +
Line 146:  " level: objlevelid };\r\n                $.ajax({\r\n                    // url: \"up" +
Line 147:  "loadQuestionnaire\",\r\n                    url: \"");
Line 148:  
Line 149:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/uploadQuestionnaire.cshtml", 1051, 2688, true);

Line 152:

Line 155:                       Write(URL.Action('UploadQuestionnaire','Questionnaire'));
Line 156:  
Line 157:              
Line 158:              #line default
Line 159:              #line hidden
Line 160:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/uploadQuestionnaire.cshtml", 3740, 49, false);
Line 161:  
Line 162:  BeginContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/uploadQuestionnaire.cshtml", 3789, 582, true);
Line 163:  
Line 164:  WriteLiteral(@""",
Line 165:                      type: ""post"",
Line 166:                      data: formdata,
Line 167:                      success: function (data) {
Line 168:                          alertify.alert('Congratulations you successfully uploaded your questionnaire. Please select Questionnaire View to Upload your CMS and Automail Messages.');
Line 169:                      },
Line 170:                      error: function (data) {
Line 171:                          alertify.alert('Sorry, that questionnaire does not meet data and formatting requirements!');
Line 172:                      }
Line 173:                  });
Line 174:              });
Line 175:          });
Line 176:      </script>
Line 177:  ");
Line 178:  
Line 179:  EndContext("~/Views/Questionnaire/uploadQuestionnaire.cshtml", 3789, 582, true);
Line 180:
